_doc: Context-aware usage rules for profile values that must NOT be used unconditionally. The autofill agent must read this file and apply restrictions before mapping any value listed here. If a PDF field does not match the required keywords, skip this value and fall back to the standard mapping.

rules.restriction: Use ONLY for legal asset ownership fields. These are fields on deeds, title documents, trust documents, estate forms, brokerage account ownership lines, or any field whose label contains: trust, grantor, grantee, beneficiary, fiduciary, title holder, asset owner, owner of record, entity name (legal context), or LLC/trust/estate.
never_use_for: any standard intake or medical form name field
